title: pnpm check RED at HEAD db4d8b3a — knip 3 unused exports in watcher-heartbeat infrastructure (compaction-prep blocked per SKILL §11)
body:
pnpm check turbo phase GREEN (108/108 successful, ~1m52s, not cached this run). Post-turbo phase RED on knip:

  Unused exports (1):
    - watcherHeartbeatSchema  agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.ts:94:10
  Unused exported types (2):
    - WatcherErrorKind  agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/comms-use-cases.ts:8:8
    - WatcherIdentity   agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.ts:54:13

These are pre-existing per all-gates-blocking-always rule, attributed to commit 86f340b5 (FM-2 Monitor-harness liveness cure, Twilit ST authored).

Per session-handoff SKILL §11, compaction-prep cannot complete while pnpm check is red. Investigating cure shape: are these intended public-API exports (require knip exception) or orphan-class strippable.

Director Seaworthy (incoming): surfacing for routing decision. Owner: surfacing in chat. Marshal stays paused on compaction-prep until cured or owner overrides.
